buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 bg-[#0055FF] text-white text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(0,85,255,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 bg-transparent text-white text-sm font-medium border border-[#27272A] transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#27272A] hover:text-white

cards.dashboard_item: group relative flex flex-col p-6 bg-[#141415] border border-[#27272A] transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#3F3F46] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-2xl overflow-hidden
cards.glass_header: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0B]/70 border-b border-white/5 saturate-150

inputs.upload_zone: relative flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-16 md:p-24 border-2 border-dashed border-[#27272A] bg-[#0A0A0B] transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#0055FF]/50 hover:bg-[#0055FF]/5 cursor-pointer overflow-hidden
inputs.text_field: w-full bg-[#141415] border border-[#27272A] text-white px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-[#0055FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0055FF] transition-all placeholder:text-[#71717A]

layouts.editor_script_col: lg:col-span-4 flex flex-col gap-6 h-full border-l border-[#27272A] pl-0 lg:pl-8

login_background.description: Professional podcast and video recording setup. Use as a moody background with heavy black overlay for the Auth page.

video_thumbnails.description: Red recording light for in-progress or demo videos.

motion_and_interactions.hover_state: All interactive elements must scale slightly (`hover:-translate-y-0.5`) and transition border colors.
motion_and_interactions.page_transition: Use Framer Motion. Fade in with a slight upward translation (`initial={{opacity:0, y:20}} animate={{opacity:1, y:0}}`).
motion_and_interactions.loading_state: Use a continuous left-to-right 'tracing beam' gradient on the border of the upload/processing container. Do not use standard spinner.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building for a JS (JSX) environment, NOT TSX. Keep everything in standard modern JavaScript.
Apply fonts in tailwind.config.js extending fontFamily: outfit: ['Outfit', 'sans-serif'], manrope: ['Manrope', 'sans-serif'], mono: ['JetBrains Mono', 'monospace'].
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for icons. Use Duotone weights to provide a high-end, technical aesthetic.
Design pattern: The application should look like HeyGen AI Editor. High contrast, precise, data-rich but clean. Do not use generic 'Cards'. Use raw borders and grids.

The Editor View (split screen) is the focal point. The script translation panel (Chinese to Khmer) must look like an inline teleprompter: stacked original (muted text) and translated (bright text) segments.
The Hero/Auth screen should have the login background image heavily overlaid (`bg-[#0A0A0B]/85`) to ensure the Google Login button pops.
The Upload Dropzone must have immense generous spacing (p-24) and a dashed border. Make it a massive target for the user.
No teal or purple-blue gradients. We are strictly using Electric Blue (#0055FF) on a Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0B) background.
Never center text by default. Align left for paragraphs and labels to ensure maximum readability and tension.
All buttons must have a clear hover state that shifts background color and adds a subtle text shadow or box shadow.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against the #0A0A0B background has at least a 4.5:1 ratio. Muted text must not be darker than #A1A1AA.
